title: Oaks bits and bops
description: Adding loads of new small decorative blocks, furniture blocks and small features to bring life and detail to your builds, replacing Oaks Decor
body:
### Description
Oak’s Bits adds small decorative blocks to enhance your Minecraft world, to help make builds feel more alive and detailed.

This mod is intended as a full replacement for [Oaks Decor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oaks-decor), which I’ve decided to retire due to its outdated design and limitations. Oak’s Bits is being rebuilt from the ground up to focus on cleaner code, better performance, and more creative flexibility for players and builders alike.

### Current Features

Hanging Pots - Connect to chains and supports blocks tagged "minecraft:small_flowers" and "minecraft:saplings"
16 Window Shutters - each with its design, can be stacked up infinitely and will dynamically open and close.
16 Checked Tiles - Perfect for your kitchens and bathrooms.
11 Wooden Wall Shelves
11 Countertops - dynamically adjust to their placements
Terrarium - supports blocks tagged "minecraft:small_flowers" and "minecraft:saplings"

This mod is designed to fit perfectly with [Oaks Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oaks-delight)
